notes: Station terminals: Contract Terminal (mission kiosk placed by the Colonization Authority) and Trade Terminal (commerce kiosk on stations across the Almagest). Both blocks are present in the world but 'cannot be unlocked in survival' — players don't craft them; they interact with them. Their inventory reports the int64 max (9,223,372,036,854,775,807 kg) which is a code sentinel for 'unlimited' rather than a real capacity — stored as unlimited=true with a raw value for completeness.

resources.description: A station terminal used by the Colonization Authority to issue contracts to engineers as part of Colonization. Features an interactable screen, keyboard, and reward hatch; large conveyor port on the rear.

terminal.function: issues mission contracts; interactive map markers and tooltips

resources.unlock: Cannot be unlocked in survival (interacted with on stations, not player-built)

resources.description: Allows trading on stations across the Almagest system.
resources.unlock: Cannot be unlocked in survival (interacted with on stations, not player-built)
dataGaps: power.maxInput (wiki reports 0, likely an oversight — the block clearly requires power to show screens)
